tools.name: generate_embeddings_with_state
tools.short_description: Generate State embeddings for single-cell RNA-seq data using the SE-600M model. This function downloads the SE-600M model from Hugging Face, installs required dependencies (git-lfs, uv, arc-state), and generates embeddings for the input AnnData object. The SE-600M model is a state-of-the-art embedding model for single-cell data that can capture complex biological patterns and cell states. Features include real-time streaming output, automatic retry with reduced batch size on failure, GPU detection and warnings, and input validation.

tools.name: generate_gene_embeddings_with_ESM_models

This function fetches all protein isoform sequences for each gene, computes embeddings for each isoform using the specified ESM model and layer, then averages the embeddings across all isoforms to create a single representative embedding per gene. The embeddings are saved as PyTorch tensors for future use. Memory-friendly implementation with rolling averages, small batch processing, and automatic memory management. Automatically handles GPU/CPU device selection and includes error recovery for out-of-memory situations by falling back to single-sequence processing.

tools.name: generate_transcriptformer_embeddings

This function downloads model checkpoints, prepares the AnnData object with required fields (ensembl_id, raw counts, assay metadata), and runs inference to generate cell or gene embeddings. Transcriptformer is a transformer-based model that can learn rich representations of single-cell gene expression data. The function automatically handles Ensembl ID pattern detection, model downloading, data preprocessing, and creates missing assay metadata columns with 'unknown' values if needed.

tools.name: unsupervised_celltype_transfer_between_scRNA_datasets

Loads both AnnData .h5ad files, prepares count layers for scVI, processes the query against the reference, and runs selected annotation methods (default: SCANVI_POPV). Saves predictions to 'output_folder/popv_output/predictions.csv'. This function allows you to use different annotaiton methods i.e. CELLTYPIST, KNN_BBKNN, KNN_HARMONY, KNN_SCANORAMA, KNN_SCVI, ONCLASS, Random_Forest, SCANVI_POPV, Support_Vector, XGboost. Based on you transfer task you can select the multiple best annotation methods. Beware each annotation method adds computational requirements for running the tool. By default it uses SCANVI_POPV method.

tools.short_description: Find alternative drugs that don't interact with contraindicated drugs using DDInter database for safer therapeutic substitutions.

tools.short_description: Find the ROIs (regions of interest) of protein bands from a Western blot or DNA electrophoresis image using threshold-based blob detection. Returns annotated image path and list of ROI coordinates. Use analyze_pixel_distribution first to determine appropriate threshold values. The returned ROI list can be converted to target_bands format for analyze_western_blot.

tools.name: predict_binding_affinity_protein_1d_sequence
tools.short_description: Predicts binding affinity between small molecules and a protein sequence using pre-trained deep learning models.

tools.name: query_drug_interactions

tools.name: retrieve_topk_repurposing_drugs_from_disease_txgnn

tools.name: analyze_atac_seq_differential_accessibility

tools.name: analyze_immunohistochemistry_image
tools.short_description: Analyzes immunohistochemistry images to quantify protein expression and spatial distribution.

tools.name: estimate_cell_cycle_phase_durations
tools.short_description: Estimate cell cycle phase durations using dual-nucleoside pulse labeling data and mathematical modeling.

tools.name: isolate_purify_immune_cells
tools.short_description: Simulates the isolation and purification of immune cells from tissue samples.

tools.name: track_immune_cells_under_flow
tools.short_description: Track immune cells under flow conditions and classify their behaviors.

tools.short_description: Extracts P1 amplitude and latency from Auditory Brainstem Response (ABR) waveform data.

tools.name: analyze_ciliary_beat_frequency
tools.short_description: Analyze ciliary beat frequency from high-speed video microscopy data using FFT analysis.

tools.name: analyze_endolysosomal_calcium_dynamics
tools.short_description: Analyze calcium dynamics in endo-lysosomal compartments using ELGA/ELGA1 probe data.

tools.name: analyze_fatty_acid_composition_by_gc

tools.name: analyze_hemodynamic_data

tools.name: analyze_protein_colocalization
tools.short_description: Analyze colocalization between two fluorescently labeled proteins in microscopy images.

tools.name: calculate_brain_adc_map
tools.short_description: Calculate Apparent Diffusion Coefficient (ADC) map from diffusion-weighted MRI data using monoexponential diffusion model.

tools.name: perform_cosinor_analysis
tools.short_description: Performs cosinor analysis on physiological time series data to characterize circadian rhythms.

tools.name: quantify_amyloid_beta_plaques
tools.short_description: Analyzes an image to detect and quantify amyloid-beta plaques, returning a detailed analysis log.

tools.short_description: Generate a 3D model of facial anatomy from MRI scans of the head and neck.
